title: T-024 — Over-consumption detection: 409 with requires_approval; approval endpoint
prompt:
# T-024 — Over-consumption detection + approval endpoint

PRD: 08-PRODUCTION-PRD.md §7.2 FR-08-E2-006, §8.2.2, §6 D2, §16.4 V-PROD-16

## Goal
Extend consume-to-wo to detect over-consumption (cumulative consumed > planned × (1+tolerance)) and return 409 requires_approval. Add separate POST /api/production/consumption/:id/approve endpoint for Shift Lead approval.

## Implementation contract
In consume-to-wo: before INSERT, compute SUM(consumed for component) + qty_consumed; if > BOM.planned_qty × (1 + tolerance from prod_settings.over_consumption_tolerance_pct, default 0.05) → INSERT consumption row with over_consumption_flag=true and over_consumption_approved_by=NULL; return 409 {error:'over_consumption', consumption_id, requires_approval:true, planned_qty, attempted_total, tolerance_pct}. Then add new endpoint POST /api/production/consumption/[id]/approve with body {approver_user_id, reason_code, notes} verifying approver role='shift_lead' or higher; UPDATE wo_material_consumption SET over_consumption_approved_by, over_consumption_approved_at, over_consumption_reason_code (CHECK chk_over_consumption_approval is satisfied per V-PROD-16). Return 200 {consumption_id, approved:true, approved_at}.

## Files (scope)
- packages/api-services/production/consume-to-wo.ts [modify]
- apps/web/app/api/production/consumption/[id]/approve/route.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/api/production/consumption/[id]/approve/__tests__/route.test.ts [create]
- packages/api-services/production/approve-over-consumption.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given cumulative consumption attempt exceeds planned×1.05, when POST consume-to-wo, then 409 over_consumption + consumption_id with over_consumption_flag=true and approved_by NULL
2. Given valid Shift Lead approver_user_id + reason_code, when POST consumption/:id/approve, then 200 approved:true and CHECK chk_over_consumption_approval satisfied
3. Given approver role='operator' (not Shift Lead), when POST approve, then 403 insufficient_role

## Test strategy
- RED: tests asserting 409+approval+role-check before route + service changes
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test consumption.*approve && pnpm --filter web test scanner.*consume-to-wo'

## Risk red lines
- Do not allow over-consumption to skip Shift Lead approval (R16)
- Do not let approver be the operator who consumed (separation of duties)
- Do not weaken tolerance source (must read from prod_settings)

pipeline_inputs.description: Over-consumption 409 detection + Shift Lead approval endpoint enforcing V-PROD-16.
pipeline_inputs.details: Tolerance default 5% from prod_settings.over_consumption_tolerance_pct. consume-to-wo writes flagged row pending approval. Approval endpoint verifies Shift Lead role + separation of duties (approver != original operator). UPDATE sets approval columns satisfying chk_over_consumption_approval (V-PROD-16).
out_of_scope: Do not implement approval modal UI (separate UI task)
acceptance_criteria: Given attempted consumption > planned×1.05, when POST consume, then 409 over_consumption + consumption_id with over_consumption_flag=true
Given Shift Lead approver + reason_code, when POST approve, then 200 approved:true and CHECK satisfied
Given operator approver role, when POST approve, then 403 insufficient_role
test_strategy: RED: tests asserting 409 + approval + role-check before changes
Run 'pnpm --filter web test consumption.*approve && pnpm --filter web test scanner.*consume-to-wo'
risk_red_lines: Do not skip Shift Lead approval
Do not let approver be original operator
